summary: Completed frontend visual testing of global neumorphic 3D effects in Minimalist theme. All 12 test scenarios PASSED. The CSS expansion correctly applies neumorphic shadows (buttons sobresaliendo, tarjetas con sombra profunda, LED glow debajo de todo) across ALL pages when Minimalist theme is active.
critical_code_review_comments: theme-minimalist.css: Comprehensive global rules for buttons, cards, inputs, sidebar, tabs, dialogs, toasts
Global button rule (line 58-66): All non-disabled buttons get 3D raised shadow + LED glow underneath
Input fields (line 143-162): Have inset/sunken shadow effect as expected
Sidebar nav links (line 186-213): Raised 3D effect with active items showing inset/pressed styling
Tab styling (line 235-266): [role='tab'] gets raised effect, [data-state='active'] gets inset effect
LED glow orbs in Layout.js (line 222-227): Multiple animated purple glow orbs in background
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme is currently set to 'minimalist' (light neumorphic). Global neumorphic CSS verified working across Login, Dashboard, Mesas, Caja, Settings, Reservations pages. Kitchen page intentionally excluded from glass effects for visibility.

global_neumorphic_buttons.description: ALL buttons across app have 3D raised shadow effect (light/dark dual shadows) with LED glow underneath

global_neumorphic_cards.description: Dashboard cards, panels, containers have raised shadows + purple LED glow emanating from beneath

sidebar_navigation_neumorphic.description: Nav items are neumorphic raised buttons; active item shows inset/pressed effect

settings_tabs_neumorphic.description: All 14 tabs have neumorphic styling; active tab is inset, inactive tabs are raised

input_fields_inset.description: Input fields (search, etc.) have inset/sunken shadow effect (pressed into surface)

login_page_neumorphic_pinpad.description: Full neumorphic PIN pad with 3D buttons that show pressed state on interaction

tables_mesas_neumorphic.description: Area tabs (Salon Principal, Terraza, Bar, VIP) and table map elements have neumorphic depth

cash_register_buttons.description: B04, CIERRE Z, ABRIR TURNO action buttons have 3D effect with LED glow

theme_switch_clean.description: Can cleanly switch between Original (dark glass) and Minimalist (light neumorphic) without visual artifacts

theme_persistence.description: Minimalist theme persists after logout/login cycle - verified via re-authentication test

led_glow_background.description: Purple glow orbs (#a78bfa) visible in background of main pages (Dashboard, Caja, Reservations, Order)

original_theme_unaffected.description: Switching to Original theme restores full dark glassmorphism without neumorphic shadows

visual_verification_details.buttons_3d_effect: Visible light shadow on top-left, dark shadow on bottom-right, creating 'popping out' appearance
visual_verification_details.cards_led_glow: Purple glow (var(--neo-glow-strong) = #a78bfa70) emanating from below cards
visual_verification_details.inset_inputs: Dark shadow on top-left inside, light shadow on bottom-right inside, creating 'sunken' appearance
visual_verification_details.active_nav_pressed: Inset shadows on active nav items indicating 'pressed' state
